α : Type u_1

γ : Type u_3
inst✝ : TopologicalSpace α
x : α
p p' q q' : α → Prop
hT : {x | p x} ∈ nhds x
hT' : {x | p' x} ∈ nhds x
hS : {x | q x} ∈ nhds x
hS' : {x | q' x} ∈ nhds x
⊢ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ nhds x

proof: filter_upwards [hT, hS] with a hp hq using Or.inl ⟨hp, hq⟩
